NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-11-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDSTEIN, JEROME B. AS TO DEFENDANT X CLUSIV  VENDING, INC. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT X CLUSIV  VENDING, INC.
